scripts.test:dev: npm run prepare-run && cross-env ENV=dev cucumber-js --config cucumber.js
scripts.test:staging: npm run prepare-run && cross-env ENV=staging cucumber-js --config cucumber.js
scripts.test:dev:verbose: npm run prepare-run && cross-env ENV=dev LOG_LEVEL=verbose cucumber-js --config cucumber.js
scripts.test:staging:verbose: npm run prepare-run && cross-env ENV=staging LOG_LEVEL=verbose cucumber-js --config cucumber.js
scripts.bdd:report:share: npm run bdd:report:json && npm run bdd:report:html
scripts.allure:report:debug: npm run test:debug && npm run allure:generate
scripts.report:full: npm test && npm run bdd:report:html && npm run allure:generate
scripts.screenshot:step: npm run prepare-run && cross-env ENV=dev SCREENSHOT_EACH_STEP=true cucumber-js --config cucumber.js
